quick_skim.title: Rethinking Text-to-Image as Semantic-Aware Data Augmentation for Indoor Scene Recognition
quick_skim.abstract: In the realm of computer vision, indoor image recognition presents challenges due to the intricate interplay of lighting conditions, occlusions, and diverse object arrangements within confined spaces. To address the lacks of training indoor images, we introduce a novel approach leveraging Stable Diffusion (SD) for the generation of synthetic images, which serve as a powerful data augmentation tool. The utilization of SD offers a principled framework for synthesizing diverse and realistic indoor scenes, thereby enriching the training data pool for robust indoor image recognition models. Experimental findings on the MIT Indoor Scene dataset reveal the potential of our proposed approach in enhancing the training of deep models when authentic data is limited. Furthermore, to prevent the misuse of SD synthetic images, we introduce a counter measure based on DIffusion Reconstruction Error (DIRE). The powerful DIRE presentation enables training robust classifiers only using lightweight deep models. Experiments show that our approach can perfectly recognize SD generated images with the accuracy of 100% using MobilenetV3.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Leverages Stable Diffusion to generate synthetic indoor images for data augmentation in recognition.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 利用Stable Diffusion生成合成室内图像作为识别任务的数据增强。
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 利用Stable Diffusion生成合成室内图像作为识别任务的数据增强。
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 利用Stable Diffusion生成合成室内图像作为识别任务的数据增强。
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes using Stable Diffusion to synthesize diverse indoor scene images for improving training data in recognition tasks, showing gains on MIT Indoor Scene dataset.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对室内场景识别训练数据不足的问题，提出利用Stable Diffusion进行语义感知的图像合成来丰富训练集。在MIT Indoor Scene数据集上验证了该方法能有效提升深层模型识别准确率，为视觉任务的数据增强提供了扩散模型新途径。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对室内场景识别训练数据不足的问题，提出利用Stable Diffusion进行语义感知的图像合成来丰富训练集。在MIT Indoor Scene数据集上验证了该方法能有效提升深层模型识别准确率，为视觉任务的数据增强提供了扩散模型新途径。
